label: 第251話
source_locator: 単行本28巻 目次 p.111
summary_short: 乙骨は宿儺の術式「捌」を模倣して攻撃し、虎杖と連携して追い詰める。天使の術式を必中として浴びせ、虎杖は伏黒の魂へ呼びかける。
summary_full: 乙骨は宿儺の術式「捌」を模倣して攻撃し、虎杖と連携して追い詰める。天使の術式を必中として浴びせ、虎杖は伏黒の魂へ呼びかける。乙骨は宿儺の捌まで模倣し、邪去侮の梯子を必中で浴びせる。虎杖は伏黒の魂へ到達するが、津美紀を殺した伏黒は生きる意志を失っていた。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 宿儺 is struck by his own fangs! 悠仁 and 憂太 do everything it takes to execute their plan against the King of Curses and make one final push to rescue 恵 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 悠仁 and 憂太 implement their plan to stop the world-cutting slash. 宿儺's face has been sliced across its left side by his own 術式 . 憂太 reminds 宿儺 that he never recovered his last finger and 悠仁 lands a powerful right hook across his damaged face. 宿儺 reels from the attack and realizes that  憂太 had 里香 consume the last 呪物 in order to copy his 術式 . The duo continues their assault on 宿儺 until he suddenly grabs 悠仁 and uses 捌 on his torso, heavily injuring the first-year. 悠仁 endures his injuries and spits blood on 宿儺's face, blinding half of his eyes. Taking advantage of the diversion, 憂太 delivers a powerful uppercut to 宿儺, freeing 悠仁 from his grasps. 悠仁 falls to the ground and tries to motivate himself to return to his feet despite his injuries. 宿儺's 呪力 output and physical control of his vessel has plummeted, 悠仁 knows this could be their final push and tries to heal himself as quickly as possible. 里香 grabs 宿儺 by the leg throws him into 悠仁, who delivers a Manji Kick . This barrage of hits gets the King of Curses to uncouple his hands and deactivate 彌虚葛籠 in an attempt to use the world-cutting 解 . Having anticipated this, 里香 restrains two of his arms while 悠仁 grabs ahold of one. 悠仁's blood bursts. 憂太 swiftly plunges his hand into the mouth on 宿儺's stomach and rips out his tongue. He suffers a slash to the face from 宿儺's free hand but 憂太 endures, slashing 宿儺 across the mouth. 憂太 intends to stop 宿儺 from performing chants and although he's pushed back by a flurry of flying slashes, he persists as the slashes are weakening. 悠仁's blood on 宿儺's face suddenly erupts, momentarily disorienting 宿儺, allowing 憂太 to cut off his only remaining free hand in the confusion. When the jujutsu sorcerers were discussing their plans to separate 宿儺 from 伏黒恵 , 悠仁 brought up 九十九由基 's notes on the soul that detailed two souls usually only mix to a certain degree, but don't become one. 脹相 wondered if 悠仁 and 宿儺 were a special case, since he himself could no longer sense the soul of the person he incarnated through. 悠仁 explained that that is due to the massive difference in 呪力 between a 呪物 and a non-sorcerer, and even then 由基's notes stated that the suppressed soul only sinks deeper, but does not disappear or merge with the incarnated individual's soul. 脹相 worried if 恵's soul had completely merged with 宿儺's due to 悠仁's earlier comment. 悠仁 clarified that he said souls "usually" don't merge because of his knowledge on 真人 's 無為転変 , which was capable of combining and transmogrifying souls in order to create different life forms. So long as that 術式 wasn't at play, two souls will never become one, and 悠仁 was confident he could knock 恵's dormant soul awake with his punches. The plan fails and 宿儺 cuts down 憂太. 来栖華 proposed that the 天使 's 術式 術式消滅 would be useful for their plan. 華 explained that a fully incarnated sorcerer has their ego directly connected to the 呪物 and the 術式. While 術式 術式消滅's ability to eradicate cursed techniques can be used to remove 宿儺 from 恵's body, since cursed techniques are enmeshed in the brain, 恵's chances of survival would be low. However, by separating the two souls and weakening the harmonization between the 呪物 and the flesh, his survival rate will skyrocket. Back in the present, as 悠仁 and 里香 restrain 宿儺, 憂太 activates 極ノ番 Output: 邪去侮の梯子 and a pillar of light shines down upon the King of Curses, engulfing 宿儺 in its destructive brilliance. 憂太 seizes the opportunity to stab a katana into the arm 悠仁 was holding and slices it in half. Having dealt an intense amount of damage, the preparations are set and 悠仁 strikes the barrier between 宿儺 and 恵's soul, asking his friend to wake up. "A surprise attack against an opponent certain of victory." Peering inside of 宿儺, 悠仁 sees the soul of a grovelling 恵 who begs him to stop trying to save him. While 悠仁 was right about the structure of the soul and the sorcerers' plan had no flaws, 恵's soul no longer had the will to live. This unexpected oversight gives 宿儺 enough time to finish the chant for 解 , which he launches at 憂太, cutting through his arm and body. After cutting down 里香 and 悠仁, 宿儺 is seemingly victorious as the 領域展開 's barrier shatters. However, he is caught by a conventional strategy for a sorcerer that he should've forseen: a surprise attack on an opponent sure of their victory. 宿儺 looks back to see that he's been stabbed through the heart by the blade of a monster with zero 呪力, 禪院真希 !
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 宿儺 乙骨憂太 虎杖悠仁 里香 天使 (言及のみ) 九十九由基 (言及のみ) 脹相 (回想) 来栖華 (回想) 真人 (言及のみ) 伏黒恵 禪院真希
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿

key_events_verified_phase11: 乙骨は宿儺の術式「捌」を模倣して攻撃し、虎杖と連携して追い詰める。
天使の術式を必中として浴びせ、虎杖は伏黒の魂へ呼びかける。
乙骨は宿儺の捌まで模倣し、邪去侮の梯子を必中で浴びせる。
虎杖は伏黒の魂へ到達するが、津美紀を殺した伏黒は生きる意志を失っていた。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
